hero.h1: Web Design & AI Automation for SME

items.title: Performance Web Design
items.desc: Modern, fast and high-conversion websites that work perfectly on all devices. Optimized for loading time, user experience and Google ranking.

items.desc: Automatic call answering, intelligent appointment booking, lead qualification and forwarding - available 24/7, without additional staff.

items.title: Lead Automation & CRM
items.desc: From the first inquiry to the closing: Automated workflows, email marketing, connections to common CRM systems and clear evaluations.

items.title: Online Shops & Booking Systems
items.desc: Individual shops (WooCommerce & Custom) or professional booking systems for service providers, trades and hospitality.

items.title: SEO & Visibility
items.desc: Technical SEO, content strategy and local search engine optimization - so you are found for relevant search queries.

items.title: Maintenance, Hosting & Support
items.desc: All-round carefree packages including regular updates, backups, security and fast support.

about.title: Who we are – Westagentur
about.p1: I am Amzi, founder of Westagentur and a passionate digital entrepreneur.
about.p2: Instead of just delivering concepts, I have been implementing my own successful digital products for years. These include Mailscout.app (B2B lead platform), Direktverteilung.com (nationwide household advertising) and Voyanero.com (Premium Travel Marketplace).
about.p3: This practical know-how from real product building flows into every client project. With us, you don't get an off-the-shelf agency, but solutions from someone who deals with the same challenges such as sales, efficiency and scaling every day.
advantages: Focus on measurable results instead of pure aesthetics
Fair, transparent pricing without hidden costs
GDPR compliant and on German servers

whyus.title: Why companies work with us
reasons: Personal support by the owner - no long communication paths
Combination of agency quality and product developer mentality
High standards of performance, design and technical cleanliness
Sustainable solutions that are still easy to maintain in 3-5 years

items.q: How long does it take to create a new website?
items.a: Depending on the scope, a complete project usually takes 4-8 weeks. We work with clear milestones and keep you updated at all times.

items.q: How much does a professional website cost?
items.a: Our packages start at €3,900 for modern business websites. Individual solutions with a shop, AI telephony or complex automations range between €6,500 and €15,000 depending on requirements. We always create an individual offer.

items.q: Do you also offer ongoing support?
items.a: Yes. We offer flexible maintenance and support packages including updates, backups, security and further development.

items.q: Do you work regionally or nationwide?
items.a: We work nationwide with clients from all over Germany. Most processes run digitally, personal appointments are possible if required.

items.q: Can you take over and optimize existing websites?
items.a: Yes, gladly. We analyze your current page and point out concrete potential for improvement.
Absolutely. AI telephony, chatbots, automations and intelligent processes are among our specialties.

cta.title: Ready for the next step?
cta.sub: Let's shape your digital future together.
cta.desc: Get an honest assessment and concrete suggestions for your business in a non-binding consultation.
cta.callback: We usually get back to you within 24 hours.
